criteriaCoverage.evidence: ordering-convergence.integration (real PG, ran): created->progress asserts count profiles=1 + 2 events; planProcessing upserts profile before event insert. Reproduced independently.
same file: progress-first stub then created -> profiles=1, attrs merged; ON CONFLICT(workspace_id,external_id) merge; order-independent.

processor-failure-dlq: failing record in batchItemFailures (no ack->redrive->DLQ), no throw. durable-boundary: deferred SQS mock proves 200 only after send resolves; reject->503; bad/unknown-key never send.
idempotency-dedup.integration (real PG): same event_id twice -> 1 events row (PK + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING), 1 profile; duplicate no-throw so not redriven to DLQ.

ingest api-key-isolation + processor workspace-isolation (real PG): key->own workspace, unknown throws, key A only creates in ws A even with shared external_id; workspace_id solely from resolveWorkspaceId; body workspace_id dropped by validateEnvelope.

recommendations: Wire the LocalStack FIFO E2E into CI (set LOCALSTACK_URL) so the SQS round-trip is exercised.
Document/test the intentional orphan-stub-on-SQS-reject case (profile upserted before send; benign due to idempotent upsert).
